schedules.title: Prep Day 1
schedules.description: PANTHER RIG 8 PER SIDE 8 SUBS 4FFS QL1 4 AXIENT 4 WEDGES DJ DIS

schedules.title: Load In
schedules.description:
FLY PA, SETUP CONTROL, TUNE, TEST I/O. 4 Hours to setup. 
Run power. Rig lights. Deploy floor package, make scenes.

schedules.title: Prep Day 1
schedules.description:
Prep Main Pa/Live Auction PA & Control. 
Prep Silent Auction & Control.

schedules.title: Prep Day 2
schedules.description: Cont. Prep Main Pa/Live Auction PA & Control. Cont. Silent Auction Prep

schedules.title: Load In
schedules.description:
JIJ Transport.Driver details inbound. 
We have a union rigger on site to point our motors, then we can fly our own PA.

schedules.title: Main Stage Pa/Live Auction Delays
schedules.description: 2 x Union Hands. Start with power. Fly mains. Fly delays. Run snake.

schedules.title: Lunch
schedules.location: Walk Away. Safeway nearby. Order food. Or bring thy own.

schedules.title: Rehearsal
schedules.description: Run through ROS, mic check Auctioneer, run through playback.

schedules.title: Load Out
schedules.description: JIJ Transport pick up 2pm~. Driver Details Inbound.

schedules.title: Load In

schedules.description: Band 3 Load in. Usually Early, rehearsal all day. Bands 1,2 load in day of show.
